strong_patterns_remove: business/CV register — comfortable with Latinate vocabulary (professionalise, facilitated, modernization, stakeholder engagement, project finance, EPC dynamics), structured bullets, formal email conventions. descriptive narrative (travel/cycling) — well-paced descriptive prose by March 2026. Examples: Fethiye camp feedback email (2026-03-28), Lycian coast descent narrative (2026-03-29). Register is in active production, not just receptive.
